name: Baked Stuffed Papayas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir the beef, onion, and garlic in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until the beef is light brown.
2. Drain; stir in tomatoes, jalapeno pepper, salt, and pepper.
3. Break up the tomatoes with a fork.
4. Heat to boiling. Reduce heat; simmer uncovered, until most of the liquid is evaporated, about 10 minutes.
5. Cut papayas lengthwise into halves and remove seeds.
6. Place about 1/3 cup beef mixture in each papaya half.
7. Sprinkle with cheese.
8. Arrange in a shallow roasting pan.
9. Pour very hot water into the pan to within 1 inch of the tops of the papaya halves.
10. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F until the papayas are very tender and hot, about 30 minutes.
